title: Earnings Preview: Oportun Financial Corporation (OPRT) Q4 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Prior to Q4 2023 earnings announcement, the company was expected to post quarterly earnings of $0.24 per share, representing a year-over-year decline of 51%, with revenues expected to be $244.29 million. For Oportun Financial, analysts had become bearish on the company's earnings prospects, resulting in an Earnings ESP of -13.40%. However, when the actual results were reported on March 12, 2024, Oportun Financial met or exceeded all guidance metrics, delivering sustained GAAP profitability, solid credit performance, continued expense discipline, and a reduced cost of capital. Revenue of $263 million to close full year 2023 with a record $1.1 billion, up 11%. GAAP operating expenses of $129 million, down 15% year-over-year. An annualized net charge-off rate of 12.3%, 50 basis points better than last year.
